text: A street scene in a residential area. In the foreground, a large, colorful umbrella (blue, yellow, red, green) provides shade over two people sitting on a low wall. The background features a low, weathered brick wall and a corrugated metal roof structure supported by wooden beams. A large tree is visible behind the roof. On the right, a utility pole holds a green political campaign poster featuring three men and the text 'SADASHIV GAWDE'.
label: Image
